hero.title: PREMIUM KERALA SPICES
hero.subtitle: Direct from the lush plantations of Wayanad and Idukki to the global market.

about.title: About BEWINGO
about.description1: BEWINGO spices are top grade, hand-picked by experts and processed under strict hygienic conditions and careful supervision which leads to unequalled savory goodness to your cooking.
about.description2: Though it is one mission but not adopted like business, the product is entirely pure with its quality control and is under the strict supervision of family. This is the reason that no other products of the same type could take the place of this.

steps.title: Sourcing
steps.text: Directly from the farm gates of Idukki and Wayanad.

steps.title: Processing
steps.text: State-of-the-art cleaning, grading, and moisture control.

steps.title: Logistics
steps.text: Standardized packaging for sea and air freight.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.text: Trusted global distribution network serving 24+ countries.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.description: From local sourcing in Kerala to trusted delivery across markets, BEWINGO is built on quality, transparency, and long-term farmer partnerships.

mission.title: A simple mission: better spices, fair trade
mission.text1: BEWINGO started with one goal: connect customers to authentic spice quality while giving farmers a fair and stable market.
mission.text2: Every batch is carefully selected, cleaned, and packed to preserve aroma, freshness, and purity. We grow with every order, while keeping quality standards consistent.

cards.title: Natural Quality
cards.text: No artificial preservatives. Clean and traceable sourcing.

cards.title: Quality Checks
cards.text: Each lot is verified before dispatch.

hero.title: Quality Sourcing
hero.description: Our sourcing strategy is built on direct farmer partnerships and rigorous industrial quality benchmarks. We ensure consistent supply for global export mandates.

process.title: Direct Sourcing
process.text: We work directly with farmers and avoid unnecessary middle layers.

process.title: Fair Partnerships
process.text: Long-term relationships with fair pricing and consistent demand.

process.title: Quality Standards
process.text: Lot checks, moisture control, and clean packaging before dispatch.

banner.title: Bulk Sourcing & Supply Chain Support
banner.text: Share your annual requirements or spot-buy needs. Our trade team will provide lot-sampled quotes and logistics timelines.

footer.companyDesc: Exporting premium Kerala agro-products to global markets. We specialize in bulk supply chains, industrial quality standards, and reliable international logistics.

contactInfo.address: 6/345 Export Road, Kochi Port, Kerala, India
